name: Rawyokan
short_description: One button fighting game inspired by the classics.
detailed_description:
Rawyokan is a single player fighting game with focus on simplicity – one button allows the player to unleash a series of strikes to the opponent or parry incoming attacks when timed correctly. Fight your way through multiple opponents and challenge the grandmaster.

Key Features:

  • 7 challenges to prove your skills.

  • Upgrade your fighter’s attributes and look.

  • Automatic save on your progress.

  • Unlockable sandbox mode for custom fights.

Get the demo now!

Rawyokan FREE is the demo of Rawyokan with limited features and no progress saved. Get the full version for more challenges, upgradable fighter attributes and look, automatic save, and unlockable sandbox mode for custom fights.
